overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the neon-lit Kabuki district at night. The character navigates through narrow covered alleys with food stalls, transitions to open plazas with towering skyscrapers in the background, and explores the vibrant cyberpunk streetscape filled with holographic advertisements and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered food stall alley with red paper lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow covered alleyway past a food stall with red paper lanterns

notable_agents.action: sitting at the food stall counter wearing a yellow jacket

entered.detail: traditional Japanese-style red paper lanterns hanging above the food stall
metal food preparation counter with stools and cooking equipment
green metal handrail running along the left wall
weathered concrete walls with green tile accents

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow covered alleyway illuminated by cyan fluorescent lights. Red paper lanterns hang above a food stall on the right where an NPC sits at the counter. The environment is enclosed with concrete walls and a metal handrail visible on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial corridor with advertisements and graffiti

events.description: exits narrow food stall area into wider neon-lit commercial corridor with Kiroshi clinic sign visible

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the corridor passing pedestrians and vending machines

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue shirt walking toward the camera
group of two pedestrians standing and conversing near the wall

entered.detail: circular neon sign with Japanese text for Kiroshi eye clinic
bright neon signs and digital displays for various products
walls covered in colorful graffiti and street art
automated vending machines with glowing displays

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow alley into a wider commercial corridor illuminated by vibrant neon signs. The Kiroshi clinic sign glows in the distance while pedestrians walk through the space. Graffiti covers the right wall and vending machines line the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with sentaku restaurant and city skyline view

events.description: emerges from covered corridor into open plaza with view of towering city skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza area approaching the restaurant with outdoor seating

entered.detail: large circular illuminated sign for Sentaku restaurant with cartoon character
towering futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and billboards
orange metal railings surrounding outdoor dining area
orange construction barriers near the restaurant entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to reveal a breathtaking view of the Night City skyline with towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements. The character walks past the Sentaku restaurant with its distinctive circular sign and orange outdoor seating area.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel district street with pierogi stand and palm tree planters

events.description: turns left onto main street passing the pierogi stand and hotel sign

agents.ego_description: turning left onto the main street and walking past the hotel and food vendors

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a concrete bench near the palm tree planter

entered.detail: large pink neon sign spelling HOTEL on building facade
small food stand with illuminated menu and service window
large concrete planter with palm tree in the center of walkway

segments.scene_description: The character turns left onto a busier commercial street featuring a prominent pink neon Hotel sign and a pierogi food stand. A palm tree grows from a large concrete planter in the center of the walkway as pedestrians move through the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: kabuki market intersection with crosswalks and holographic billboards

events.description: reaches large intersection with prominent Kabuki market sign and crosswalks
turns right into narrow alleyway away from main intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection and turning into a narrow side alley

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading KABUKI on the market building facade
yellow striped crosswalk markings on the asphalt
massive holographic advertisements covering the building faces

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the bustling Kabuki market intersection with its iconic green signage and yellow crosswalks. Massive holographic billboards illuminate the area before the character turns right into a darker narrow alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow descending alley leading to waterfront overlook

events.description: enters dark narrow alley with descending stairs and graffiti-covered walls
emerges at waterfront overlook with view of city skyline and large vertical billboard

agents.ego_description: descending the narrow stairway and emerging at the waterfront overlook

entered.detail: close concrete walls covered in graffiti and utility boxes
descending concrete stairway with metal railings
metal safety railing at the overlook viewpoint
tall vertical digital billboard displaying a portrait advertisement

segments.scene_description: The character descends a narrow graffiti-covered alleyway with dim green lighting, then emerges at a waterfront overlook. The scene opens to reveal a stunning view of the city skyline with a massive vertical holographic billboard and metal railings along the overlook edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the claustrophobic confines of a neon-lit alleyway into the sprawling, holographic scale of the Night City skyline. It begins within a narrow covered passage illuminated by cyan lights and red lanterns, moving past a quiet food stall before emerging into a wider commercial corridor filled with glowing Kiroshi signage and graffiti-covered walls. The scene then opens up to reveal towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements as the character passes the circular Sentaku restaurant and turns toward a busier street marked by a pink hotel sign and concrete planters. This progression leads into the bustling Kabuki market intersection with its iconic green signage and yellow crosswalks, before the camera dives back into a dim, graffiti-strewn alley. Finally, the path descends and opens once more at a waterfront overlook, revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of the city skyline dominated by a massive vertical holographic billboard.
